lines.speaker: Angelo
lines.text: Hey, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Angelo
lines.text: This is one of the branches for Mahogany Homes, Gielinor's first construction company.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wow, how can I get involved?

lines.speaker: Angelo
lines.text: If you go see Amy in the Falador branch, she'll fill you in. Her office is just east of the Estate Agent in Falador.

lines.speaker: Angelo
lines.text: What kind of contract would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a beginner contract please?

lines.speaker: Angelo
lines.text: Please could you go see [client] [area] [city], [location description] for us? You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.text: Could I have a novice contract please?
